description.LOCATION_EN: the roundabout between Hoi Yuen Road and Wai Yip Street
description.LOCATION_CN: 介乎開源道及偉業街之間的迴旋處

2024-05-18T15:46:00.CONTENT_EN:
The Transport Department announces at 03:51pm:
Due to emergency repairing works , part of the lanes of the roundabout between Hoi Yuen Road and Wai Yip Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   At the same time, the fast lanes of Wai Yip Street (both bounds) between Kei Yip Street and Hoi Yuen Road are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T15:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，介乎開源道及偉業街之間的迴旋處的部份行車線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  同時，偉業街(來回方向)介乎基業街及開源道之間的快線現已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-19T16:17:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of the roundabout between Hoi Yuen Road and Wai Yip Street which was closed due to emergency repairing works is re-opened to all traffic.   At the same time, the fast lanes of Wai Yip Street (both bounds) between Kei Yip Street and Hoi Yuen Road which were closed due to emergency repairing works are re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-19T16:17:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因緊急維修而封閉的介乎開源道及偉業街之間的迴旋處的部份行車線現已解封。  同時，較早前因緊急維修而封閉的偉業街(來回方向)介乎基業街及開源道之間的快線現已解封。

2024-05-18T17:36:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-05-18T17:36:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-05-18T18:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) ends at Lung Cheung Road near Diamond Hill MTR Station. Traffic is congested now.
2024-05-18T18:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在龍翔道(往荃灣方向)的車龍龍尾已到龍翔道近鑽石山港鐵站。 現時上址交通擠塞。

2024-05-18T18:25:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lung Cheung Road (Tsuen Wan bound) near Lung Cheung Road Lookout which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2024-05-18T18:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的龍翔道(往荃灣方向)近龍翔道眺望處的部份行車線現已解封。 車龍有待消散。

2024-05-19T07:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to suspected gas leakage, all lanes of the section of Wang Lok Street (both bounds) between Yuen Long Sewage Treatment Works and Wang Fu Street are closed to all traffic.   Affected MTR Bus Route K68 has been diverted.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2024-05-19T07:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因懷疑氣體洩漏，宏樂街(來回方向)介乎元朗污水處理廠與宏富街之間的一段全線現已封閉。  受影響港鐵巴士路線第K68號須改道行駛。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2024-05-20T01:01:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of the section of Wang Lok Street (both bounds) between Yuen Long Sewage Treatment Works and Wang Fu Street which were closed due to suspected gas leakage are re-opened to all traffic.
2024-05-20T01:01:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因懷疑氣體洩漏而封閉的宏樂街(來回方向)介乎元朗污水處理廠與宏富街之間的一段全線現已解封。

2024-05-21T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.

Eastbound franchised bus and green minibus services will be diverted as follow: - Citybus route nos. 77, 99, 720X and N8, Cross Harbour route nos. 110 and 606 and Green Minibus route no. 65 departures that passed by Yiu Tung Estate Bus Terminus will be diverted via Yiu Hing Road westbound, Wai Hang Street, Tai Lok Street and Shau Kei Wan Road eastbound before resuming its original routeing; while Green Minibus route no. 50 departures that passed by Yiu Tung Estate Bus Terminus will be diverted via Yiu Hing Road westbound, Wai Hang Street and Tai Lok Street before resuming its original routeing. Westbound franchised bus and green minibus services will be diverted as follow: - Citybus route nos. 77, 82S, 99 and N8, Cross Harbour route nos. 110 and 606 departures that after Shau Kei Wan Road westbound near Sun Sing Street will be diverted via Shau Kei Wan Road westbound, Tai Hong Street, Lei King Road, Tai On Street, Shing On Street, Yiu Hing Road eastbound, Yiu Tung Estate Bus Terminus and Yiu Hing Road westbound before resuming its original routeing; while Green Minibus route no. 65 departures that after Shau Kei Wan Road westbound near Nam Hong Street will be diverted via Nam Hong Street, Yiu Hing Road westbound, Sun Sing Street, Sai Wan Ho Street, Shing On Street and Yiu Hing Road eastbound, before resuming its original routeing.
2024-05-21T14:57:00.CONTENT_CN: 因受惡劣天氣影響及緊急斜坡復修工程仍在進行中，耀興道介乎耀東邨耀貴樓與耀東邨耀興樓之間的唯一行車線現已封閉。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 往東行方向的巴士及小巴路線須改道如下: -城巴第77、99、720X及N8號線、過海巴士第110及606號線及專線小巴第65號線須改道行駛，路線途經耀東邨巴士總站後，會改經耀興道西行、惠亨街、太樂街及筲箕灣道東行，然後返回原有路線；至於專線小巴第50號線在途經耀東邨巴士總站後，則會改經耀興道西行、惠亨街及太樂街，然後返回原有路線。 往西行方向的巴士及小巴路線須改道如下: -城巴第77、82S、99及N8號線、過海巴士第110及606號線須改道行駛，路線途經筲箕灣道西行近新成街後，巴士會改經筲箕灣道西行、太康街、鯉景道、太安街、成安街、耀興道東行、耀東邨巴士總站及耀興道西行，然後返回原有路線；至於專線小巴第65號線在途經筲箕灣道西行近南康街後，小巴會改經南康街、耀興道西行、新成街、西灣河街、成安街及耀興道東行，然後返回原有路線。
